hero.tagline: A heuristic read of price, MSP, and seasonal coverage across the reporting window. Values stay qualitative where the signal is thin.

alerts.title: Market Alerts
alerts.noAlertsDetail: All tracked commodities sit above or near MSP in the current window.
alerts.commoditySignalsDetail: These alerts are filtered to the selected commodity only.
alerts.pressureDetail: Signals are grouped by price pressure, momentum, and coverage risk.

profit.title: Profit Estimate
profit.subtitle: Enter your harvest quantity to estimate returns at MSP, current price, and the expected ceiling.

dashboard.pressurePointsDesc: Signals are grouped by price pressure, momentum, and coverage risk.
dashboard.routesTitle: Open a dedicated commodity detail page.

charts.priceTrajectoryDesc: MSP, Kharif, and Rabi reference prices charted together so the spread is visible at a glance.
charts.noPriceData: No priced seasons available for this commodity.
charts.arrivalDesc: Arrival volume per season, scaled against the peak observed value.

pulse.deviationsDesc: Commodities ranked by how far their latest reference price sits from MSP.

seasonalComparison.label: Seasonal comparison
seasonalComparison.title: Kharif vs Rabi mix
seasonalComparison.desc: Coverage split and arrival intensity across observed seasons.

summaryTable.label: Detailed view
summaryTable.title: Season-by-season breakdown
